reviews.review_body: I am a Student from this school I am very happy that my mom joined me in this school in my childhood. Even now I am studying in this school.This school feels like home to me. Teachers are very supportive...love my school ❤️❤️❤️

reviews.author: swathi b
reviews.review_body: Minimal basic etichis, morals they don't carry. Most worst school. The principal don't know how to deal with parents.  Don't know who gad given principal position.many teachers don't know proper English. Feew teacher are good. Washrooms are worse. The accountant and all play games. Collect extra fee, fine per each day, fraudsters. If the fee is late principal asked parents to take the children home. What a person he is. Need to file a case against this.

reviews.author: THE MOTIVATIONAL ARTS
reviews.review_body: I'm the student studying from pre primary means from nursery now I am 9 th standard and this school is really awesome with multi talented teachers especially principals, maths, social, telugu. We also have cultural activities sports games inter school championships 8 periods of school and also ncc with great gopi sir pt sir strict but good.
